corrections.text: The article's South China Morning Post source link is broken. The cited URL contains an extraneous segment ('china-fast-tracks-humanoid-robots-and-embodied-ai-into-industry-under-nationwide-programme') and returns HTTP 404. The correct, live URL is https://www.scmp.com/economy/china-economy/article/3356629/china-fast-tracks-humanoid-robots-and-embodied-ai-industry-under-nationwide-programme. All facts attributed to the SCMP source — the joint MIIT/SASAC directive issued Tuesday, June 10, 2026, the target of 10,000 humanoid-robot deployments and more than 100 high-value applications by year-end, the "entering 'work mode'" quotation, the end-of-June implementation-plan and end-of-November progress-report deadlines, and the Shao Hao (Vivo) quotation — were independently verified against the corrected SCMP article and corroborated by Caixin Global and eWeek, and are accurate as published.
